narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,362 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.8 percentage points.
